skill_availability_goal: Verify that designer-agent mirrors confirmed 4-level feature_path into design output paths without creating synonym or truncated directories.
prompt: 用户说：PM 已确认 feature_path 是 chat-interface/messages/history/search，PRD 在 docs/pm/chat-interface/messages/history/search/PRD.md，TRD 在 docs/engineer/chat-interface/messages/history/search/TRD.md。请做设计路由并说明 UI/UX 和视觉产物位置，不要把 search 或 history-search 写成新的顶层 design 目录，也不要进入实现。
